configEntries.description: pipx executable used for app checks and upgrades.

scripts.name: Check pipx Updates
scripts.description: Checks pipx-managed apps and emits stable dashboard parser lines.

steps.label: Check pipx updates
Detect pipx
steps.command:
pipx_cmd="{{config.pipxCommand}}"
[ -n "$pipx_cmd" ] || pipx_cmd=pipx
command -v "$pipx_cmd" >/dev/null 2>&1 && "$pipx_cmd" list --json >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo found

scripts.name: List Installed pipx Apps
scripts.description: Reports pipx-managed apps for package inventory.

steps.label: List pipx apps

scripts.name: Update All pipx Apps
scripts.description: Upgrades all pipx-managed apps by upgrading each app package inside its pipx virtual environment.

steps.label: Update pipx apps
steps.command:
pipx_cmd="{{config.pipxCommand}}"
[ -n "$pipx_cmd" ] || pipx_cmd=pipx
"$pipx_cmd" list --json | python3 -c 'import json,os,subprocess,sys
data=json.load(sys.stdin)
home=os.environ.get("PIPX_HOME") or os.path.expanduser("~/.local/share/pipx")
for name in data.get("venvs",{}):
 py=os.path.join(home,"venvs",name,"bin","python")
 if os.path.exists(py):
  subprocess.check_call([py,"-m","pip","install","--upgrade",name])'

scripts.name: Update Selected pipx Apps
scripts.description: Upgrades the selected pipx apps inside their pipx virtual environments.

steps.label: Update selected pipx apps
steps.command:
home="${PIPX_HOME:-$HOME/.local/share/pipx}"
for pkg in {{quotedPackages}}; do
  py="$home/venvs/$pkg/bin/python"
  if [ ! -x "$py" ]; then
    echo "pipx app is not installed: $pkg" >&2
    exit 2
  fi
  "$py" -m pip install --upgrade "$pkg"
done
